description_long: This is a well-used baseball with a white leather exterior, featuring prominent red stitching that spirals around the surface in two interlocking curves. The ball displays multiple areas of visible wear, including grayish scuff marks, dirt stains, and surface abrasions, particularly on the panels between the seams. Faint blue writing is present on one side, though it is partially faded and difficult to read. The stitching is thick and slightly raised, providing a tactile grip, and the seams are tightly sewn. The overall surface is matte with a slightly rough texture, indicating extensive use in outdoor environments.
description: A worn white baseball with red stitching, visible scuff marks, and faded blue writing. The surface is matte and rough, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: This view highlights several large scuff marks and dirt stains on the white leather, with red stitching curving prominently across the surface.
description_view_1: The blue writing is most visible in this view, though it is faded and partially illegible, with scuff marks and stitching running horizontally.
description_view_2: This angle shows a single round scuff and a patch of dirt, with the red stitching forming a tight arc across the ball.
description_view_3: The surface appears slightly cleaner here, with fewer scuff marks and the red stitching forming a symmetrical border around the ball.
attribute_stitch_pattern: Two interlocking curved seams with thick, raised red stitches running in a double-helix pattern around the ball.
attribute_visible_wear_or_scuff_marks: Multiple gray and brown scuff marks, dirt stains, and surface abrasions are visible across all sides, especially between the seams and on the panels.
